text:
Assistant: CI failed on the LOC ratchet — my merge of `channels_rpc.rs` pushed it to 550 lines, over the repo's 500-line hard ceiling. I need to split it before merging, per this repo's file-size rule. Let me look at the file's structure.
 [...] Assistant: I'll extract the archive RPC handler into its own submodule — a clean domain boundary that also fixes the LOC violation. [...] Assistant: Extracting archive alone isn't enough — the file is still 10 lines above the pre-existing baseline (460), which counts as "soft-limit drift" since it's already over 300. Let me also split out the `channels list` rendering logic into its own domain submodule.

Assistant: Now remove the now-empty `channels_rpc/tests.rs`, wire `list` module into `channels_rpc.rs`, and remove the moved code. [...] One thing worth flagging: CI initially failed on the LOC ratchet — my rebase resolution had merged `channels_rpc.rs` to 550 lines, over the repo's 500-line hard ceiling. I split it into `channels_rpc/archive.rs` and `channels_rpc/list.rs` submodules (matching the repo's domain-boundary-split convention), re-verified with 382 passing tests + clean clippy/fmt, force-pushed the fix to the still-solo feature branch, and merged once CI went green. [...] • I’m resolving the CLI conflict by keeping #217’s nested test module and shared
  channel_about parser, then adding only the Archive subcommand and its parse test.
 [...] Assistant: Now let me resolve args.rs by removing the duplicate `channel_about` fn (already shared as `crate::channel_about`) and keeping the external test module, then adding the archive parse test to `tests.rs`.

Assistant: Now add the archive parse test to the external `tests.rs` file: [...] Summary of what I picked up: the Codex agent's rebase of `codex/issue-214-channel-archive` onto merged #217 had 3 conflicted files (`args.rs`, `server.rs`, `channels_rpc.rs`). I resolved them by keeping both independent RPC handlers (`rpc_channels_edit` from #217, `rpc_channels_archive` from #214) plus their shared imports, moved the archive CLI-parse test into the external `tests.rs` module, completed the rebase, rewrote the placeholder "WIP" commit message, verified with `cargo test --lib` (382 passed) and `cargo clippy` (clean), then pushed and opened the PR closing #214.
